hero.title: Recruitment design that commands attention.
hero.description: Ditch the spreadsheets. Experience a high-performance recruitment dashboard built for the modern talent architect.

painPoints.title: Centralized recruitment data management, instead of fragmented files and unstable spreadsheets.

scattered.title: Mandates Scattered Across Tabs
scattered.desc: Stop hunting through bookmarks and email threads. Store all positions and client requirements in a single system.

tracking.title: Difficult Candidate Tracking
tracking.desc: Don't let potential talent drift away in emails. Manage your entire recruitment funnel in one place.

screening.title: Sluggish Screening
screening.desc: Manual filtering takes hours. Our algorithmic matching engine does it in seconds.

pipeline.title: Loss of Pipeline Control
pipeline.desc: Track every candidate's status instantly on a single intuitive dashboard.

data.title: No Data for Decision Making
data.desc: Measure performance and improve hiring velocity with real-world evidence.

jobCenter.title: Recruitment Operations Hub
jobCenter.desc: Organize mandates by impact, priority, or client. A high-fidelity interface designed to help you execute with precision.

candidateProfile.title: Talent Profiles, Reimagined
candidateProfile.desc: Stop hunting through PDFs. Our system distills raw CVs into elegant, actionable profiles that reveal the person behind the text.

matchScore.title: Algorithmic Precision Matching
matchScore.desc: Instantly identify the elite 1% of your candidate pool. Our scoring engine evaluates technical debt, culture fit, and skill alignment.

dataDriven.title: Analytics for High-Stakes Hiring
dataDriven.desc: Turn intuition into evidence. Real-time metrics on conversion velocity, sourcing quality, and hiring efficiency at your fingertips.

steps.title: Define the Mandate
steps.desc: Input requirements from any source. HR Lite builds a structured recruitment matrix instantly.

steps.title: Curate the Talent
steps.desc: Bulk import or manual addition. Every profile is enhanced with AI-driven insights and journals.

steps.title: Execute the Search
steps.desc: Visualize the journey via high-performance pipelines and data-driven selection boards.

questions.q: What defines the HR Lite experience?
questions.a: Unlike legacy ATS systems built for compliance, HR Lite is built for performance. We emphasize editorial clarity, aesthetic excellence, and high-velocity execution.

questions.q: How is my candidate data protected?
questions.a: Data integrity is our priority. We employ enterprise-grade encryption and strictly adhere to global privacy frameworks including GDPR.

questions.q: Can I transition from my current system?
questions.a: Our semantic import engine allows you to migrate from Excel or legacy databases with zero data loss and perfect field mapping.

cta.title: Scale your recruitment to the next level.
cta.subtitle: Join the elite recruiters building the future of talent operations with HR Lite.

footer.description: Architecting the future of recruitment through design and data intelligence.
